description_long: This is a cylindrical bucket with a matte, dark gray exterior and a pale yellow interior. The rim of the bucket features irregular, dripping streaks of yellow, suggesting either paint or a residue, which adds a distinctive visual element. The bucket has straight, slightly faceted sides and a wide open top, with no visible handles or reinforcements. The interior appears smooth and clean, matching the yellow color seen on the rim. There are no visible labels, markings, or decorative elements aside from the yellow drips. The overall design is utilitarian, suitable for use in urban environments such as streets, parks, or construction sites.
description: A dark gray cylindrical bucket with a pale yellow interior and irregular yellow drips along the rim, lacking handles or markings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the bucket's open top, yellow interior, and prominent yellow drips down the rim.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting a large yellow drip running down the left side of the bucket.
description_view_2: Rear view with minimal yellow drips, mostly showing the plain dark gray exterior and yellow interior.
description_view_3: Side view with a single, narrow yellow drip on the right, and the yellow interior visible.
